LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF DANAI KIETIKUL'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. COURTS APPLY A POLICY OF GREAT LIBERALITY IN PERMITTING AMENDMENTS TO THE COMPLAINT AT ANY STAGE OF THE PROCEEDINGS UP TO OR INCLUDING TRIAL. 48 CAL 4TH 471. DEFENDANT ADMITS NO NEW FACTS ARE ALLEGED OR THAT THE AMENDMENT IS STILL BASED ON CONTRACT LAW. THUS THE PENDING SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTION MAY APPLY IN PRINCIPAL TO THE NEW COUNT AS WELL. THE TRIAL IS SET FOR DECEMBER 17, 2007. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART, REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR # 4761

LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT KRISTINE PAYNE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO WHETHER THE CHECKS EVIDENCES IS A LOAN OR A GIFT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: KATHY KOLLEHNER, CSR # 4102

MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF DANAI KIETIKUL'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Amended Complaint IS GRANTED. COURTS APPLY A POLICY OF GREAT LIBERALITY IN PERMITTING AMENDMENTS TO THE COMPLAINT AT ANY STAGE OF THE PROCEEDINGS UP TO OR INCLUDING TRIAL. 48 CAL 4TH 471. DEFENDANT ADMITS NO NEW FACTS ARE ALLEGED OR THAT THE AMENDMENT IS STILL BASED ON CONTRACT LAW. THUS THE PENDING SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTION MAY APPLY IN PRINCIPAL TO THE NEW COUNT AS WELL. THE TRIAL IS SET FOR DECEMBER 17, 2007. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: John K. Stewart, Reporter: Susan Crozier, CSR # 4761 =301/JKS/X-MW
